creator: epopen@gmail.com
text:
Hi Maintainer.

Sorry this topic is not bug but I have no idea where post it.

Current, as summary, it hard-code at "command_args"(--interface=127.0.0.1 & --port=10040), therefore using local(Inside jail) only.
Release both to configurable(postfwd_flags?) if possible?

Because 2 
1.Using IPv6 only system access.
2.I using ports sysutils/monit for monitor whole system in base, but mail/postfix-postfwd running in jail, therefore monit can not monitor it.

Thanks a lot.
